symbols.type_text: (source: string, tier: string) => { provider: string, modelId: string, baseUrl: string|null, slotId: string|null, emergency: boolean } — opus hardcoded anthropic; ANTHROPIC_MODEL env short-circuit; else execFileSync('bash', [route-provider.sh, source, tier], {env:{BRAND: brand}}) + JSON.parse; catch → emergency anthropic claude-sonnet-4-6
(slotId: string|null, success: boolean) => void — no-op for null slot; execFileSync release-slot.sh <slotId> <'true'|'false'>; failures non-fatal

Candidates: SELECT provider,model_id,base_url,max_concurrent FROM tickets.provider_config WHERE (source=:src OR source='*') AND tier=:tier AND enabled ORDER BY (source=:src) DESC, priority ASC. Claim (atomic): INSERT provider_health ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING; UPDATE provider_health SET active_agents=active_agents+1 WHERE provider=:prov AND active_agents < :maxc AND (cooldown_until IS NULL OR cooldown_until<=now()) RETURNING provider. slotId == provider name. Fallback: anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6, emergency:true

UPDATE tickets.provider_health SET active_agents=GREATEST(0,active_agents-1), updated_at=now() WHERE provider=:prov; on success=false: failure_count+1, cooldown_until when failure_count+1 >= 3 (10 min). Release-Seite der Claim-Arithmetik — muss reserved_tokens symmetrisch dekrementieren
(health: {cooldown_until?, active_agents?}|null, maxConcurrent: number) => boolean — false in cooldown; else Number(h.active_agents ?? 0) < Number(maxConcurrent ?? DEFAULT_MAX_CONCURRENT=3)

symbols.signature: export async function routeProvider(query, source, tier)
symbols.type_text: (query: (kind: 'load-config'|'load-health'|'claim-slot'|'release-slot'|'record-failure', params) => Promise<{rows}>, source: string, tier: string) => Promise<{provider, modelId, baseUrl, releaseSlot(success), emergency?}> — injected-query SSOT; pipeline.js darf NICHT importieren (inlined clone)
(rows: ProviderConfigRow[], source: string) => ProviderConfigRow[] — source-specific vor '*', dann priority asc

symbols.signature: export async function releaseSlot(query, provider, success)
symbols.type_text: (query, provider: string, success: boolean) => Promise<void> — query('release-slot'); bei !success query('record-failure')

symbols.signature: export async function getProviderConfig(source: string, tier: 'sonnet' | 'haiku' | 'opus'): Promise<ProviderChoice>
symbols.type_text: ProviderChoice = { provider: string; modelId: string; baseUrl: string | null; apiKey: string }. SELECT pc.provider,pc.model_id,pc.base_url,pc.api_key FROM tickets.provider_config pc LEFT JOIN tickets.provider_health ph ON ph.provider=pc.provider WHERE (pc.source=$1 OR pc.source='*') AND pc.tier=$2 AND pc.enabled AND (ph.cooldown_until IS NULL OR <= now()) ORDER BY (pc.source=$1) DESC, pc.priority ASC LIMIT 1 — KEIN Slot-Claim, kein active_agents-Check (read-only Auswahl)

deepseek → DEEPSEEK_API_KEY; anthropic → ANTHROPIC_API_KEY; sonst 'not-required' (local-cluster/local-lmstudio/local-ollama). Neue Provider (openrouter, opencode-zen, google-gemini, github-models) brauchen hier Zweige oder api_key-Row

symbols.signature: export async function setProviderCooldown(dbPool: Pool, source: string, provider: string, minutesFromNow: number): Promise<void>
symbols.type_text: INSERT provider_health ... ON CONFLICT (provider) DO UPDATE SET failure_count+1, last_failure=now(), cooldown_until=now()+interval

symbols.signature: export async function initProviderConfigSchema(c: PoolClient): Promise<void>
symbols.type_text: Idempotentes DDL: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tickets.provider_config / tickets.provider_health; COACHING_COLUMNS-Loop via ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS <col> <type>; DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS provider_config_tier_check; Default-Routing-Seeds ON CONFLICT (source,tier,priority) DO NOTHING. Neue Spalten context_window/context_budget/reserved_tokens folgen demselben ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS-Muster

InterfaceDef = { id: string; label: string; kinds: InterfaceKind[]; suggestedModels: CatalogModel[]; defaultBaseUrl?: string; apiKeyEnv?: string; perRowApiKey?: boolean; supportsParams?: ParamKey[]; custom?: boolean }. CatalogModel = { id: string; label: string; tier?: 'sonnet'|'haiku' }. Bestehende ids: anthropic, deepseek, local-cluster, local-lmstudio, local-ollama, openai, mistral, lumo, voyage, custom. Pure module — keine Imports (S2), keine Brand-Literale (S3)

symbols.signature: export function interfaceById(id: string): InterfaceDef | undefined

symbols.type_text: ServiceDef = { key: string; label: string; icon: string; source: string; tier: Tier; brandScoped: boolean; paramSet: ParamSet }; Tier = 'sonnet'|'haiku'|'coaching'. SOURCE-Konstante = { websiteLlm: 'website-llm', assistantChat: 'assistant-chat', ticketTriage: 'ticket-triage', coaching: 'coaching' }. source-Strings MÜSSEN exakt den getProviderConfig-Call-Sites entsprechen — neue Source 'lavish-artifact' hier registrieren

columns.name: brand
constraints: partial UNIQUE INDEX provider_config_coaching_brand_provider (brand, provider) WHERE source='coaching'

api_contracts.response_type: { entries: ProviderEntry[], health: HealthRow[] } (listProviders/listHealth aus ki-config-db) | { error } 401/403/500

api_contracts.request_type: NewProvider: { source: string, tier: 'sonnet'|'haiku', priority: int>=0, provider: string, model_id: string, base_url: string|null, max_concurrent: int>=1 (default 3), enabled: boolean (default true), api_key: string|null } — parseNew validiert; TIERS=['sonnet','haiku']

risks.note: codebase-memory MCP hat kein indexiertes Projekt ('No projects indexed yet') — symbols und call_graph wurden per Read/Grep-Fallback aus dem Quellcode abgeleitet (source: read-fallback) statt aus dem Graph; call_graph ist manuell hergeleitet.

S1-Gate: scripts/factory/pipeline.js hat 713 LOC bei statischem Limit 600 und OHNE Baseline → s1_budget = -113. Die routeProviderSync-Paritätsänderung muss netto-LOC-neutral bleiben oder das Plan-Lint-Gate schlägt fehl (Baseline-Eintrag S1:scripts/factory/pipeline.js anlegen oder Code extrahieren).

db_tables stammen aus dem Live-mcp-postgres (eine Brand-DB). Migration + Seeds müssen auf BEIDE per-brand DBs (BRAND=mentolder und BRAND=korczewski via factory_psql) angewendet werden — Muster siehe Header von scripts/migrations/2026-06-14-llm-availability-seed.sql.

Der Dateiname der neuen Seed-Datei (scripts/migrations/2026-07-03-local-qwen35-seed.sql) ist ein Vorschlag nach bestehendem Muster; Datei existiert noch nicht (loc=0), ebenso scripts/migrations/2026-07-03-context-budget.sql.

Vier parallele Routing-Implementierungen müssen die Token-Arithmetik konsistent bekommen: route-provider.sh (claimt atomar), release-slot.sh (Release-Seite, im Task-Scope implizit!), provider-router.js isUsable+routeProvider (injected query), provider-config.ts getProviderConfig (claimt NICHT — nur Cooldown-Filter; klären, ob context_budget dort nur gelesen wird), pipeline.js routeProviderSync (delegiert an route-provider.sh — erbt Verhalten, braucht ggf. nur ctx-Weitergabe).

POST /api/admin/ki/providers (parseNew) kennt die neuen Spalten context_window/context_budget nicht — falls Rows mit Budget über die Admin-UI pflegbar sein sollen, ist das API-Handling ein (im Proposal nicht explizit genannter) Folgepunkt; sonst nur per Seed/SQL setzbar.
